title: Crafting recipe
description: One recipe on the workbench (FR-ECO-04..07 · GDD Part X/XI · wireframe SCR-10). Static, content-as-data definition of something the survivor can make, build, repair, or purify. The engine (sim/economy.ts) is a generic interpreter — no per-recipe branching: it consumes every `input`, applies the ONE payload the recipe carries (an item `output`, an `installsRoom`, a `repairs` restore, or a `purifyFrom`/`purifyTo` conversion), spends `timeCost` hours, and logs a beat. Time is the real price (SCR-10). A recipe is gated by a learned `blueprint` (omit ⇒ known from the start), a built `room` (omit ⇒ craftable in the bare shelter), and its `inputs`. Mechanical dials (spoilage rate, durability wear) live in the engine; this file supplies the recipe.

itemId.description: An item content id, e.g. "item.bandage" or "item.blueprint.molotov".

qty.description: Units of the item — a whole, positive count.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing at this schema.

id.description: Stable content id of the form recipe.<category>.<slug>, e.g. "recipe.medical.bandage".

category.description: The GDD X recipe family. medical/weapon/shelter/survival produce (or build); repair restores an artifact; purify converts dirty water safe.

label.description: The row name shown on the workbench (SCR-10 "Reinforced plank").

worldEffect.description: What it does IN THE WORLD, in plain words — "Boards the east window", not "+5 integrity". Surfaced as prose; never a number (FR-UI-02).

inputs.description: The full known cost — the mono line of the SCR-10 row. Every input is consumed on craft. At least one (nothing is free; time is also a cost, see timeCost).

output.description: The item this recipe produces (medical/survival/weapon). Omit for a room-installing, repair, or purify recipe.

mintsArtifact.description: A weapon recipe whose `output` is a tracked durability ARTIFACT (an ItemInstance that wears with use and can be repaired), not a plain stack. Requires `output`.

startDurability.description: Starting durability (0–100) for a minted artifact. Defaults to 100 (full). mintsArtifact only.

installsRoom.description: A shelter recipe whose product is a ROOM installed at the shelter node (e.g. "room.workshop"), unlocking recipes gated on that room. shelter category.

repairs.description: A repair recipe: restore a carried durability artifact by this many points (capped at 100), appending a provenance line to its story. repair category.

purifyFrom.description: A purify recipe: the dirty item id converted (e.g. "item.water-dirty"). Pairs with purifyTo. purify category.

purifyTo.description: A purify recipe's safe product (e.g. "item.water"). Pairs with purifyFrom. purify category.

blueprint.description: A learned unlock this recipe needs (found in the world as an "item.blueprint.<slug>" and studied). Omit ⇒ the recipe is known from the start (survival basics).

room.description: A built room this recipe needs to run (e.g. "room.workshop"). Omit ⇒ craftable in the bare shelter, no room required.

timeCost.description: Hours the craft costs — the real price (SCR-10). At least 1, so every craft is a resolved, world-advancing turn.

noise.description: Noise the craft deposits at the node (a loud make, like a firearm). Omit or 0 for a quiet craft.

description.description: What the recipe is and why it exists (author/design reference).

notes.description: Author commentary (JSON has no comments, ADR-0002).
